title: GENERAL DENTAL CARE - 211info
text: NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC GENERAL DENTAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental services for children and adults which includes diagnostic (exams, x-rays), preventative (dental sealants, cleanings, fluoride, education) and restorative (fillings, crowns, some root canals, extractions, partial and full dentures). Emergeny care provided for patients with symptoms of dental pain, an abscess, swelling or bleeding. 10690 NE Cornell Road Suite 220 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (503) 848-5861 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 848-5861 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment FEES: Accepts OHP (Capitol Dental, CareOregon Dental, ODS Community Dental) and Delta Dental. Sliding scale fee available. No insurance $25-$50 down payment for first visit. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. If applying for sliding scale fees bring one of the following, last 2 pay stubs, previous year's tax return or unemployment statement. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington and Clackamas Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 48 stops on NE Cornell Road and bus 52 stops on 185th Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Dental Restoration Emergency Dental Care General Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC HUMAN REPRODUCTION - PRENATAL CARE OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY MEDICAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC
